reasoning: The freeze value is 0.085, and there is no strong, actionable information to significantly deviate from this crowd consensus. Historically, 50+ bps cuts at any specific scheduled meeting occur around 5-6% of the time, typically during mild-to-severe recessions or crisis environments. Given that most economic projections lean towards a "soft landing" rather than a recession by early 2026, 25 bps cuts or pauses are far more likely. However, the ~8.5% probability accurately captures the long-tail risk of an economic downturn or crisis emerging by January 2026 requiring a jumbo cut.
